_meta.author: Claude (va-legislature-refine overnight autopilot)
_meta.note: VA state Senate batch (state tier): SD-32 Kannan Srinivasan (D), SD-33 Jennifer Carroll Foy (D), SD-34 Scott Surovell (D, Majority Leader), SD-35 Dave Marsden (D), SD-36 Stella Pekarsky (D). Evidence-first finalization from primary roll-call records (LIS vote API / VPAP), issue scorecards (ReproRising 2025, ChoiceTracker, Giffords), and reputable local press (VPM, Virginia Mercury, Cardinal News, Ballotpedia). All five are reliably progressive on the documented dimensions; every FALSE is cited; dimensions with no public record (family/child sovereignty, Christian liberty, federal overreach for most) are left null, not inferred. Election cells were deliberately NOT scored off the felon-voting-rights restoration amendment alone (it does not map cleanly to the rubric's voter-ID/mail-in cells) — only Surovell scored an election FALSE, on his documented voter-photo-ID-repeal advocacy.

profile.religion: Hindu (Tamil; sponsored a Hindu invocation in the VA House, Feb 2024)
profile.background: VA State Senator, SD-32 (Loudoun County), since Jan 2025 (won the Jan 7, 2025 special election to replace Suhas Subramanyam, elected to U.S. Congress); former Delegate HD-26 (2024-2025). First Indian-American immigrant elected to the VA House. M.S. Accounting (Old Dominion); career in finance/insurance.

kannan-srinivasan.notes_set: VA State Senator, SD-32 (Loudoun); sitting since Jan 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Reliably progressive record on the documented dimensions. SANCTITY OF LIFE: ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion'; on the prevailing Democratic side of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (SJ247/HJ1, 2025-2026); endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA. MARRIAGE: on the prevailing Democratic side of the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJ249/HJR3, 2025-2026). SELF-DEFENSE: Giffords-endorsed 'gun safety champion'; sponsored HB22 (2024) banning auto-sears/'Glock switches'; gun-violence-intervention funding and ghost-gun-ban priorities. Dimensions with NO public record (family/child sovereignty, Christian liberty, public justice, federal overreach, border/immigration, most of economics, voter-ID/mail-in) left NULL — not inferred from party. Caveat: his individual roll-call line on the amendments was corroborated via the named ReproRising grade + party-line vote reporting (LIS is a JS app); the amendment votes are documented party-line Democratic passages while he held the seat.

0.note: ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion'; on the prevailing Democratic side of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (SJ247/HJ1) — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Backs the full pro-abortion-access agenda (A+ Champion); opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: On the prevailing Democratic side of the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJ249/HJR3, 2025-2026) — does not affirm marriage as one man and one woman.

1.note: Voted with the Democratic majority to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

0.note: Giffords-endorsed 'gun safety champion'; record is uniformly pro-gun-control, opposite of permitless constitutional carry.

1.note: Sponsored HB22 (2024) banning auto-sears/trigger activators ('Glock switches'); worked on red-flag impact reporting; supports new gun restrictions.

4.note: Giffords champion; pursues additional firearm restrictions (ghost-gun ban) — contrary to opposing citizen-disarmament initiatives.

profile.religion: Not publicly confirmed (campaign appearances at Baptist congregations during the 2021 gubernatorial run; church-centered upbringing; no formal denomination stated)
profile.background: VA State Senator, SD-33 (Fairfax/Prince William), since Jan 2024; former Delegate (2018-2020); 2021 gubernatorial primary candidate. VMI graduate (third class of female cadets); JD; career public defender and former magistrate.

jennifer-carroll-foy.notes_set: VA State Senator, SD-33; sitting since Jan 2024; former Delegate; public-defender background. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Uniformly progressive record. SANCTITY OF LIFE: voted YEA on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJR247, 21-19, Jan 21 2025); patron of SB15 (abortion-shield) and contraceptive-coverage bills; endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA and EMILY's List (2019 'Rising Star'). MARRIAGE: in the Democratic YEA bloc on the same-sex-marriage amendment (SJR249/HJR3); publicly championed it. ECONOMICS: chief co-patron of minimum-wage increases, filed a right-to-work-repeal bill (Dec 2025). PUBLIC JUSTICE: documented cash-bail-reform advocate ('justice-for-profit'). IMMIGRATION: opposed GOP enforcement bills (warned against deputizing local police as ICE agents); Dream Act / driver-privilege-card support. SELF-DEFENSE: Giffords-endorsed; patron of SB27 (gun-industry liability, signed 2026), SB364 (gun-violence-prevention center), SB797 (purchase-permit). Family/child-sovereignty, Christian-liberty, federal-overreach dimensions = NO public record, left NULL. One within-party nuance: initially abstained then supported an earned-sentence-credit bill (not a cross-party deviation).

0.note: Voted YEA on the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (SJR247, Senate 21-19, Jan 21 2025); patron of abortion-shield/contraception bills — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Helped lead the Reproductive Health Protection Act removing abortion restrictions; opposite of abortion-abolition.

4.note: Endorsed/backed by EMILY's List (2019 'Rising Star' nominee) and Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA — has accepted abortion-industry-PAC support.

0.note: In the Democratic YEA bloc on the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJR249, Senate 24-15; HJR3 2026); publicly championed it.

1.note: Supported codifying same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

2.note: Chief co-patron of minimum-wage increases and clean-economy spending; filed a right-to-work-repeal bill — expansionary fiscal/labor priorities, opposite of balanced-budget restraint.

1.note: Documented cash-bail-reform advocate criticizing Virginia's 'justice-for-profit' bail system — supports reducing/eliminating cash bail.

2.note: Opposed GOP immigration-enforcement bills; warned against deputizing local police as ICE agents; Dream Act / driver-privilege-card support — opposite of opposing sanctuary policies.

0.note: Giffords-endorsed; sponsored a firearm-purchase-permit bill (SB797) — opposite of permitless constitutional carry.

1.note: Patron of SB27 (gun-industry liability, signed 2026) and SB364 (gun-violence-prevention center); part of the 2026 Democratic gun-control slate.

4.note: Authored gun-restriction legislation; opposite of opposing citizen-disarmament initiatives.

profile.religion: Not publicly confirmed (no stated current affiliation; family history notes ancestors who fled Jewish persecution in Russia/Poland — heritage, not a stated faith)
profile.background: VA State Senator, SD-34 (City of Fairfax + Fairfax County); Senate Majority Leader (since Jan 2024) and Judiciary chair; in the Senate since a Jan 2010 special election. 12th-generation Virginian; JD, UVA Law; trial attorney.

scott-surovell.notes_set: VA Senate Majority Leader, SD-34; in the Senate since 2010. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Strongly progressive, well-documented leadership record. SANCTITY OF LIFE: ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion'; voted YES on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJ247). MARRIAGE: voted YES on the same-sex-marriage amendment (SJ249); chief sponsor of Virginia's 2020 conversion-therapy ban for minors. ELECTIONS: vocal floor proponent of repealing Virginia's voter-photo-ID requirement (2020). PUBLIC JUSTICE: chief patron of the 2021 death-penalty abolition (SB1165, Senate 21-17); led the 2020 policing-reform effort and ended jury-sentencing. IMMIGRATION: sponsored ICE-restriction bills and 2020 driver-privilege cards for undocumented residents. SELF-DEFENSE: Giffords champion; chief patron of SB436 (2020 voluntary do-not-sell-firearms list) and co-patron of the 2020 red-flag law. ONE GENUINE CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION (noted, NOT scored as alignment): in 2020 he voted in committee AGAINST advancing an assault-weapons ban — but he stated this was strategic/timing and that he supports banning assault weapons, so it does not represent a pro-2A position. Family/child-sovereignty, Christian-liberty, federal-overreach = NO public record, NULL.

0.note: ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion'; voted YES on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJ247) — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Voted the full pro-abortion-access agenda; opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Voted YES on the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJ249, Senate 24-15, Jan 21 2025) — does not affirm marriage as one man and one woman.

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

2.note: Chief sponsor of Virginia's 2020 conversion-therapy ban for minors — opposite of rejecting transgender/gender-identity ideology.
Voted with Democrats for the $15 minimum-wage increase; expansionary fiscal priorities, opposite of balanced-budget restraint.

1.note: Vocal Senate-floor proponent of repealing Virginia's voter-photo-ID requirement (2020) — opposite of supporting photo voter ID with citizenship verification.

2.note: Chief patron of the 2021 death-penalty abolition (SB1165) — opposite of proportional punishment of the gravest evildoers.

4.note: Chief patron abolishing capital punishment — contrary to affirming the magistrate's God-ordained duty to bear the sword (Rom. 13:4).

2.note: Sponsored bills restricting ICE detainers/enforcement and 2020 driver-privilege cards for undocumented residents — opposite of opposing sanctuary policies.

0.note: Giffords 'unparalleled champion'; record is uniformly pro-gun-control, opposite of permitless constitutional carry.

1.note: Co-patron of Virginia's 2020 red-flag (extreme-risk protective order) law and chief patron of SB436 (do-not-sell list) — supports the very measures this cell asks the candidate to oppose.

4.note: Gun-control champion advancing firearm restrictions — contrary to opposing citizen-disarmament initiatives.

profile.religion: Not publicly confirmed (no public source states an affiliation)
profile.background: VA State Senator, SD-35 (Fairfax County); in the Senate since a Jan 2010 special election (succeeded Ken Cuccinelli); Delegate 2006-2010. 17 years head of the Fairfax County Juvenile Detention Center; appointed Acting Director of the VA Dept. of Juvenile Justice by Gov. Gilmore (R). Chief sponsor of the 2021 VA Consumer Data Protection Act.

dave-marsden.notes_set: VA State Senator, SD-35 (Fairfax); in the Senate since 2010; corrections/juvenile-justice career. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Best-documented record in this batch — individual roll-calls pulled from the LIS vote API. SANCTITY OF LIFE: voted YES on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJ247 SV89, 2025; SJ1, 2026); ReproRising 'A+ Champion'. MARRIAGE: voted YES on the same-sex-marriage amendment (SJ249 SV91, 2025; SJ3, 2026). ECONOMICS: voted YES on SB1 (2026, $15 minimum wage). SELF-DEFENSE: Giffords champion; chief patron of SB496 (2026, locked storage of handguns in vehicles); voted YES on SB749 (2026 assault-weapons + >15-round-magazine ban) and SB495 (2026 red-flag expansion). Family/child-sovereignty, Christian-liberty, public-justice, federal-overreach, border/immigration, voter-ID/mail-in = NO specific public record located, left NULL (conservative FreedomIndex 4% lifetime, consistent with a reliably progressive record; its two 'freedom-aligned' credits — SB851 rainwater harvesting and HB158 45-day cap on executive emergency orders — are process votes that do not map to the rubric's economic cells and are not scored).

0.note: Voted YES on the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (SJ247, roll-call SV89, Jan 21 2025; SJ1, 2026); ReproRising 'A+ Champion' — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: ReproRising A+; voted the full pro-abortion-access agenda; opposite of abortion-abolition.

0.note: Voted YES on the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJ249, roll-call SV91, Jan 21 2025; SJ3, 2026) — does not affirm marriage as one man and one woman.

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

2.note: Voted YES on SB1 (2026) raising the minimum wage to $15/hr by 2028 — expansionary fiscal priority, opposite of balanced-budget restraint.

0.note: Giffords-endorsed gun-safety champion; record is uniformly pro-gun-control, opposite of permitless constitutional carry.

1.note: Voted YES on SB749 (2026 assault-weapons + >15-round-magazine ban) and SB495 (2026 red-flag expansion); chief patron of SB496 (vehicle locked-storage) — supports the very measures this cell asks the candidate to oppose.

4.note: Authored/advanced firearm restrictions; contrary to opposing citizen-disarmament initiatives.

profile.religion: Greek Orthodox Christian (per Wikipedia; married to Pavel Pekarsky; Greek descent)
profile.background: VA State Senator, SD-36 (Fairfax County), since Jan 2024 (defeated incumbent George Barker in the 2023 primary). Former FCPS teacher; Fairfax County School Board member (Sully District) 2020-2023 and Board Chair 2021-22. B.A. and M.Ed., George Mason University. Ran for U.S. House (VA-11) in the 2025 primary and lost; retains her state Senate seat.

stella-pekarsky.notes_set: VA State Senator, SD-36 (Fairfax); sitting since Jan 2024; former Fairfax County School Board chair. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Reliably progressive record. SANCTITY OF LIFE: patron of and voted YES on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJ247 SV89); ReproRising 'A+'; ChoiceTracker 'Pro-Choice'; sponsored SB137 (2026, clinic-protection); on record '100% pro-choice'; endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA + EMILY's List. MARRIAGE/GENDER: in the Democratic bloc on the same-sex-marriage amendment (SJ249); voted YES on SB1098 (Reproductive & Gender-Affirming Health Care Act); OPPOSED 'Sage's Law' (parental notification on gender transition) and moved to reject Youngkin's gender-privacy budget amendment. FAMILY/CHILD: her opposition to parental-notification-on-gender (Sage's Law) is a documented contrary position on parental sovereignty. ECONOMICS: party-line support for the $15 minimum wage (SB1). IMMIGRATION: co-patron of SB491 (bars schools disclosing student data to immigration) and SB351 (limits ICE in 'protected areas'). SELF-DEFENSE: Giffords-endorsed; sponsored SB115 (2026, restrict out-of-state CCW reciprocity) and SB255 (2024, safe-storage notification). Christian-liberty (SB1031 ambiguous), federal-overreach, election (voter-ID/mail-in), and police/bail public-justice cells = NO clean public record, left NULL.

0.note: Patron of and voted YES on the reproductive-freedom amendment (SJ247, roll-call SV89, Jan 21 2025); ReproRising 'A+'; on record '100% pro-choice' — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: ChoiceTracker 'Pro-Choice'; sponsored clinic-protection SB137 (2026); voted the full pro-abortion-access slate — opposite of abortion-abolition.

4.note: Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA and EMILY's List (2023) — has accepted abortion-industry-PAC support.

0.note: In the Democratic bloc on the same-sex-marriage constitutional amendment (SJ249, Senate 24-15) — does not affirm marriage as one man and one woman.

1.note: Supported codifying same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

2.note: Opposed 'Sage's Law' (parental notification on gender transition) and voted YES on SB1098 (Reproductive & Gender-Affirming Health Care Act) — opposite of rejecting transgender ideology / affirming immutable biological sex.

4.note: Moved to reject Youngkin's gender-privacy amendment and backs gender-affirming policy in schools — opposite of opposing LGBTQ+ promotion in public schools/policy.

1.note: Opposed 'Sage's Law' (parental notification when a student presents as the opposite sex) and rejected Youngkin's parental gender-privacy amendment — opposite of parental notification/consent on gender interventions for minors.

2.note: Opposed parental-notification restrictions and supports gender-affirming/SOGI-friendly school policy (FCPS sex-ed/gender-identity record) — opposite of opposing SOGI/gender-ideology curricula.
Party-line Democratic support for raising the minimum wage (SB1) — expansionary fiscal priority, opposite of balanced-budget restraint.
Co-patron of SB491 (bars schools disclosing student/family data to immigration authorities) and SB351 (limits federal ICE enforcement in 'protected areas') — opposite of opposing sanctuary policies.

0.note: Giffords-endorsed; sponsored SB115 (2026) restricting out-of-state concealed-carry reciprocity — opposite of permitless constitutional carry.

1.note: Committed (Giffords) to banning assault weapons + high-capacity magazines; patron of SB255 (safe-storage notification) — supports the measures this cell asks the candidate to oppose.

4.note: Advances firearm restrictions and ended-CCW-reciprocity proposals — contrary to opposing citizen-disarmament initiatives.
